# Tech Trainings

## Sheet: Team

## Sheet: In case of PluralSight Errors

| In case of errors, upgrade requirements you can try the steps  |
| --- |
| Please follow the below steps to get started and try to unlock the access - |
| a. Log out from your existing Pluralsight account |
| b. Clear cache: History>Clear Browsing History> Time Range: All time. > mark on cached images and files > Clear data. |
| c. Pop up window is not blocked |
| d. Click on this link: www.pluralsight.com    |
| e. Click Sign In at the top of the screen |
| f. Click Sign in with Skills |
| g. Click Sign in with Company or School |
| h. Type Company URL as Accenture or Accenture.com |
| Click Sign in |
| Only after performing these steps, please try accessing the link again. |
| Please also try using incognito mode. Let us know if the issue persists. |
| In case if it still doesn't work you can send an e-mail to Learning.Vendor.Mgmt <Learning.Vendor.Mgmt@accenture.com> |
